candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets.
Non-current assets, not current assets.

variables.notes: Clear reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash; useful cross-check but balance-sheet line is preferred for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the beginning of the period
candidates.why: Beginning cash, not the balance-sheet cash position for the reporting date.

variables.notes: Preferred balance sheet cash line selected.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.

variables.notes: Clear reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Best clean balance-sheet measure of short-term debt/current portion of debt, explicitly excluding leases as required.
Also represents current maturities of long-term debt, but the current-portion line is cleaner and explicitly excludes leases.
Current lease liabilities; baseline STD should exclude leases.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: Selected a label outside the shortlist because it is a cleaner direct measure of short-term debt and explicitly excludes leases. Avoided adding the maturities line to prevent double counting.

candidates.why: Best match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities payable on the balance sheet.
Tax asset/receivable, opposite of taxes payable.
Deferred tax, not current taxes payable.

variables.notes: Current tax liability line identified directly on the balance sheet.

candidates.why: Exact total/net PPE line on the balance sheet; preferred for PPEGT.
Only a component of PPE, not the total.

candidates.row_label: Investments in Tangible and Intangible Assets
candidates.why: Capital expenditure cash flow, not the balance-sheet PPE stock.

variables.notes: Preferred total net PPE line selected.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets on the balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Net cash flows from operating activities
candidates.why: Exact net operating cash flow line on the cash flow statement.

candidates.row_label: Cash flows from operating activities before financial items and taxes
candidates.why: Operating cash flow before interest and taxes, not the final net operating cash flow.

candidates.row_label: Cash flows before changes in working capital
candidates.why: Intermediate subtotal before working-capital changes, not OANCF.

final_choice.row_label: Net cash flows from operating activities

variables.notes: Selected the final net operating cash flow line from the cash flow statement.
